# Source Documentation — Golden Fixture

**Purpose**: Deterministic CI golden fixture for the live artifact contract guard.

It is NOT generated by a live LLM call — it is a hand-curated reference artifact.

## Human-readable summary

**Source node**: golden-fixture-source-db
**Graph**: golden-fixture
**Phase**: source-docs

The golden fixture documents a synthetic data source node with well-formed card_sections.
